description: User 1 (pn@getsally.io): Apollo credit estimation, cost tracking, and performance measurement. Tests estimate_cost tool and credit date-range queries.

steps.description: User asks how many credits a gathering run will cost BEFORE running it.
steps.user_prompt: How many Apollo credits would it cost to find 50 IT consulting companies in London?
user_prompt_variants: Estimate the cost of gathering 50 companies
How many credits will I spend?
What's the Apollo cost for 50 targets?

steps.description: User asks how many credits were spent in a period.
steps.user_prompt: How many Apollo credits did I spend this week?
user_prompt_variants: Show me my Apollo credit usage
How many credits have I used?

steps.description: System should warn if approaching Apollo credit budget.
steps.notes: Test user budget: 100 credits max (per requirements_source.md)

db_checks: Aggregate credit usage queryable by date range

ui_checks.check: Apollo credit usage shown with date range
